title: Cross-Experiment PRMP Meta-Analysis: Effect Sizes, Forest Plots & Moderator Analysis
summary: Demo notebook performing a cross-experiment meta-analysis of PRMP (Predictive Residual Message Passing) vs baseline across 9 tasks from 4 datasets. Computes Hedges' g effect sizes, DerSimonian-Laird random-effects pooling (pooled g=+0.43, p=0.46, I²=54.7%), regression vs classification subgroup analysis, WLS meta-regression with cardinality×predictability interaction, ablation validation with random predictions, and win/loss/draw tally. Produces forest plot, funnel plot, and summary table. Data: 9 pre-extracted task results with baseline/PRMP means, standard deviations, and FK diagnostic features loaded from mini_demo_data.json. Conclusion: PARTIALLY_CONFIRMED — positive pooled effect but not statistically significant.
